instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `ensure-list-of` that evaluates a list-producing expression once and asserts that every element satisfies a given predicate, signaling an error on the first violation. Returns the list. Use gensyms for the list and per-element variables.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (GET-NUMS)))
            (DOLIST (#:G2 #:G1)
              (UNLESS (INTEGERP #:G2)
                (ERROR "Element ~S fails ~S" #:G2 'INTEGERP)))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (GET-NUMS)))
            (DOLIST (#:G113 #:G112)
              (UNLESS (INTEGERP #:G113)
                (ERROR "Element ~S fails ~S" #:G113 'INTEGERP)))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
